headline: Gilead’s New Liver Approvals Reframe PBC Goals And Revenue Mix
summary: Gilead Sciences (NasdaqGS:GILD) reported positive Phase 3 IDEAL trial results for Livdelzi in primary biliary cholangitis (PBC), supporting alkaline phosphatase (ALP) normalization as a treatment goal. The US Food and Drug Administration granted accelerated approval for Livdelzi in PBC. The FDA also approved Hepcludex for the treatment of hepatitis delta virus infection. Gilead Sciences, known for its focus on antiviral and liver disease treatments, is adding fresh momentum to its liver...
